title: Musical Times
description: Music player mod based on scenarios.
body:
Allows for custom music files.
How to use - Place your .ogg files into the musical times folders, folders are listed as

- Day - Music plays at day time
- Night - Music plays at night time
- Menu - Music that plays in the menu
- Nether - Music plays in the nether
- End - Music plays in the end
- Boss - Music that plays when there is a boss bar (Works with modded bosses)

Each music folder has a config file, in here you can change the time between songs, master volume and each songs volume. You can also enable / disable the music for each folder.

If you keep a folder empty then no music will play example, the menu folder has no song files in it, no music will play in the menu. However, if you disable the menu folder through the config then it will just play minecraft default music in the menu.

Report bugs / suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/vrekW2ZPbp)

Yes you can use this in your modpack as long as credit is appropriately given.
